texts.label: page_header
texts.orig: Carestation 620/650/650c (A1/A2)
texts.text: Carestation 620/650/650c (A1/A2)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1.6 Display control
texts.text: 1.6 Display control

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The system uses touchscreen technology, hard keys, and a ComWheel to access system functions, menus, and settings.
texts.text: The system uses touchscreen technology, hard keys, and a ComWheel to access system functions, menus, and settings.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: WARNING
texts.text: WARNING

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Liquids on the display may degrade the performance of the touchscreen. If liquids come in contact with the display, lock the touchscreen and clean the display. Unlock the touchscreen once the display has been cleaned to resume use of the touchscreen.
texts.text: Liquids on the display may degrade the performance of the touchscreen. If liquids come in contact with the display, lock the touchscreen and clean the display. Unlock the touchscreen once the display has been cleaned to resume use of the touchscreen.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. ComWheel Selects a menu item or confirms a setting. Turn clockwise or counterclockwise to scroll through menu items or change settings.
texts.text: ComWheel Selects a menu item or confirms a setting. Turn clockwise or counterclockwise to scroll through menu items or change settings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Home key Removes all menus from the screen.
texts.text: Home key Removes all menus from the screen.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Screen Lock/Unlock Locks the touchscreen. Toggles between lock and unlock functions.
texts.text: Screen Lock/Unlock Locks the touchscreen. Toggles between lock and unlock functions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: key
texts.text: key

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Start/End Case key Initiates Start or End Case function.
texts.text: Start/End Case key Initiates Start or End Case function.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Touchscreen Activates functions when touch areas on the screen are selected.
texts.text: Touchscreen Activates functions when touch areas on the screen are selected.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. Audio Pause key Stops audio for 120 seconds for any active, eligible high and medium priority alarms. Prevents audio (audio off) for 90 seconds when no medium or high priority alarms are active. Allows the operator to acknowledge any non-active medium or high priority latched alarms.
texts.text: Audio Pause key Stops audio for 120 seconds for any active, eligible high and medium priority alarms. Prevents audio (audio off) for 90 seconds when no medium or high priority alarms are active. Allows the operator to acknowledge any non-active medium or high priority latched alarms.

texts.label: caption
texts.orig: Figure 1-6 · Display controls
texts.text: Figure 1-6 · Display controls

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1.6.1 Touch points
texts.text: 1.6.1 Touch points

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The touchscreen has numerous touch point areas that make accessing menus and settings quick and easy.
texts.text: The touchscreen has numerous touch point areas that make accessing menus and settings quick and easy.

texts.label: page_header
texts.orig: 1 Introduction
texts.text: 1 Introduction

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The function keys on the right side of the screen provide direct access to commonly used functions.
texts.text: The function keys on the right side of the screen provide direct access to commonly used functions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The ventilation quick keys enable setup of ventilation modes.
texts.text: The ventilation quick keys enable setup of ventilation modes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The gas control quick keys provide a method to set up the gas used for a case.
texts.text: The gas control quick keys provide a method to set up the gas used for a case.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Touch only one touch point at a time to ensure the correct selection is made.
texts.text: Touch only one touch point at a time to ensure the correct selection is made.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: CAUTION
texts.text: CAUTION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Do not apply excessive force to the touchscreen as damage may occur.
texts.text: Do not apply excessive force to the touchscreen as damage may occur.

texts.orig: Figure 1-7 · Normal/Full screen view with shaded touch point areas
texts.text: Figure 1-7 · Normal/Full screen view with shaded touch point areas

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Measured value touch points
texts.text: Measured value touch points

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Touching measured values provides access to the Alarm Setup menu and alarm limits.
texts.text: Touching measured values provides access to the Alarm Setup menu and alarm limits.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Touch the measured value to access the Alarm Setup menu.
texts.text: Touch the measured value to access the Alarm Setup menu.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. The Alarm Setup menu displays.
texts.text: The Alarm Setup menu displays.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Select the alarm limit and set it to the correct value. Touch the value on the touchscreen or push the ComWheel to confirm the desired setting.
texts.text: Select the alarm limit and set it to the correct value. Touch the value on the touchscreen or push the ComWheel to confirm the desired setting.

description.text:
PURPOSE: The image shows the display control panel of the system, including the touchscreen and hard keys.
COMPONENTS: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, AC 26052
VALUES: None
DESCRIPTION: The image shows the display screen with hard keys along the bottom. The system uses touchscreen technology, hard keys, and a ComWheel to access system functions, menus, and settings. Callout AC 26052 is visible along the right side of the image.

PURPOSE: The image shows a diagram of the touchscreen and its various touch point areas on the device.
COMPONENTS: Wave fields (1), Measured values (2), Function keys (3), Digit fields (4), Ventilator quick keys (5), Split screen values (6), AC 24.050
VALUES: None
DESCRIPTION: The touchscreen has numerous touch point areas to make accessing menus and settings quick and easy, as well as function keys on the right side of the screen that provide direct access to commonly used functions. The ventilation quick keys enable the setup of ventilation modes.
